params.name: The Standard of Ur
params.description:
On Jun 29, 1931 AD, The Standard of Ur was discovered by British archaeologist Leonard.
The Standard of Ur is a Sumerian artifact found in a royal tomb in Ur. Inlaid mosaic panels cover each long side of the Standard. Each presents a series of scenes displayed in three registers, upper, middle, and bottom. The two mosaics have been dubbed "War" and "Peace" for their subject matter, respectively a representation of a military campaign and scenes from a banquet. The panels at each end originall …
